music.title: tiktok_pipes
music.usage_basis: Hope explicitly requested use of the most relevant track from his own SoundCloud for his portfolio film.
music.selection_reason: Recent, authored for short-form, sparse opening, strong 16.44s and 25.54s drops, and enough rhythmic space for voice.

voice.speaker: Hope Atina
voice.used_excerpt: I'm less about talk and more about action.
voice.usage_basis: Hope supplied the talk as portfolio evidence and explicitly requested his voice in the social film.
